title: Shigo da
destinationNote: Ana ƙara abubuwan da aka shigo da su a cikin wannan workspace a matsayin sabbin shafuka na sama.
stepScope: Zaɓi abin da za a shigo da shi
oneTimeToken: Yi amfani da token na lokaci ɗaya
shareReminder: Token ba ya ganin kowane shafi ta atomatik. Raba shafuka ko ma'adanai na sama da kake so ka shigo da wannan haɗi a Notion da farko.
tokenIntroTitle: Shigo da kaya ta token API na Notion
tokenIntroDesc: Ga masu karɓar bakuncin gida, liƙa token da ka ƙirƙira a Notion shine mafi amintaccen saiti. Babu wani sirrin app na OAuth da ake buƙata a cikin wannan app.
tokenInstructionItems: Bude shafin token na Notion, ƙirƙiri token samun dama na sirri ko haɗin ciki, sannan kwafa token.
Yi amfani da token API na Notion na yanzu wanda ya fara da ntn_.
Ba haɗin damar karanta abun ciki. Ƙara damar bayanan mai amfani idan kana buƙatar filayen mutane.
A cikin Notion, bude kowane shafi ko database na babban mataki, sannan yi amfani da Raba ko Haɗi don ƙara wannan haɗin.
connectionStorageUnavailable: Ana amfani da token don wannan shigowa kawai kuma ba a adana su a wannan uwar garken. Don kunna haɗin da aka adana, saita HANJI_NOTION_IMPORT_SECRET a bayan fage.
scopeWorkspaceDesc: Duk abin da haɗin zai iya shiga. Dangantaka tsakanin shafuka suna nan gaba ɗaya.
scopePagesDesc: Zaɓi ɗaya ko fiye na tushen, sannan a shigo da shafukan 'ya'ya, shafukan da aka haɗa/ma'adanai, dangantaka, da nassoshi na gani a maimaita.
scanRoots: Bincika tushen da za a iya shiga
rootScanHint: Yana bincika shafuka da tushen bayanan da aka raba tare da token ko haɗin da aka ajiye a sama.
rootScanComplete_one: An samo {{count}} takarar tushe mai samuwa.
rootScanComplete_other: An samo {{count}} takarorin tushe masu samuwa.
rootScanEmpty: Ba a sami wasu abubuwan manyan mataki da aka raba ba. Raba wani shafi na manyan mataki ko database tare da haɗin a cikin Notion, sannan a sake bincike.
rootScanEmptyTitleNamed: Alamar tana aiki kuma tana haɗe da sararin aiki na Notion “{{workspaceName}}” - amma babu wani shafi da aka raba da wannan haɗin tukuna.
rootScanEmptyTitleAnon: Alamar tana aiki - amma babu wani shafi da aka raba da wannan haɗin tukuna.
rootScanEmptyWhy: Haɗin Notion na iya ganin shafukan da aka haɗa musu kai tsaye kawai. Ƙirƙirar alamar kaɗai ba ta nuna komai ba.
rootScanEmptyStep1: A cikin Notion, buɗe shafin manyan mataki da kake son shigo da shi → ··· menu → Connections → ƙara wannan haɗin.
rootScanEmptyStep2: Ko buɗe notion.so/profile/integrations → haɗinka → shafin Access, ka zaɓi shafuka a can.
rootScanEmptyStep3: Raba shafi ɗaya na manyan mataki ya haɗa da duk ƙananan shafukansa da databases. Sannan a sake bincike anan.
rootScanEmptyOtherWorkspaceNamed: Idan shafukan na cikin wani sararin aiki na Notion banda “{{workspaceName}}”, wannan alamar ba za ta iya ganinsu ba - ƙirƙiri haɗin kai a wannan sararin kuma yi amfani da alamar sa maimakon.
rootScanEmptyOtherWorkspaceAnon: Idan shafukan na cikin wani sararin aiki na Notion daban, wannan alamar ba za ta iya ganinsu ba - ƙirƙiri haɗin kai a wannan sararin kuma yi amfani da alamar sa maimakon.
rootScanHasMore: Notion ta dawo da ƙarin abubuwa. Idan wani tushe ya ɓace, raba shafukan tushe da kake buƙata kawai ko yi amfani da shigo da dukan sararin aiki.
manualRootFallback: Manna links ko IDs a maimakon (na ci gaba)
rootIdsPlaceholder: Manna hanyoyin shafi ko ID na Notion - ɗaya a kowane layi
pagesRecognized_one: {{count}} abu na tushe da aka zaɓa
pagesRecognized_other: {{count}} abubuwa na tushe da aka zaɓa
scopeWarning: Maƙasudin da API na Notion ba zai iya shiga ko bayyana ba na iya zama riƙo a bayyane.
fullWidthPages: Shigo da shafuka a cikakken faɗi
fullWidthPagesDesc: Notion baya bayyana asalin maɓallin Cikakken Faɗi. Ajiye wannan a kunne don sanya shafukan da aka shigo da su ba na database row ba su yi faɗi.
importedItems_one: Abu {{count}} da aka shigo da shi
importedItems_other: Abubuwa {{count}} da aka shigo da su
resumeNeedsCredential: Sake haɗa haɗin da aka adana ko shigar da ainihin alamar Notion don ci gaba da wannan bincike.
discoveryPaused: An dakatar da bincike kafin kammalawa. Sake fara shi don ci gaba.
cantCancelImport: An kasa soke shigo da Notion.
openImportedPage: Bude shafi da aka shigo da shi
emptyDatabaseImported: An shigo da database mara komai.
noMarkdownBlocks: Babu tubalan Markdown da aka samu
useSupportedFile: Yi amfani da fayil ɗin Markdown, rubutu, ko CSV.
tokenOrConnectionRequired: Shigar da token API na Notion ko zaɓi haɗin da aka ajiye.
rootPagesRequired: Zaɓi aƙalla ɗaya daga cikin abubuwan tushe da aka bincika, manna hanyar shafi ko ID, ko canza zuwa dukan sararin aiki.
jobCreated: An ƙirƙiri aikin shigo da Notion.
cantStartImport: An kasa fara shigo da Notion.
tokenMustStartWithNtn: Yi amfani da token API na Notion wanda ya fara da ntn_.
oauthMissingCode: Kira dawo na haɗin Notion ya rasa code ko state.
cantFinishOAuth: An kasa kammala OAuth na Notion.
reviewReady: Bitan shigo da Notion a shirye yake.
cantReview: An kasa duba shigo da Notion.
expandNeedsCredential: Shigar da Notion token ko zaɓi haɗi da aka ajiye don faɗaɗa bincike.
rootScanNeedsCredential: Shigar da token API na Notion ko zaɓi haɗin da aka ajiye kafin bincike.
rootScanTimedOut: Binciken ya tsaya saboda uwar garken bai amsa ba. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.
importApplied: An aiwatar da shigo da Notion.
cantApply: An kasa aiwatar da shigo da Notion.
fileRetryFinished: An sake gwada kwafin fayil ya ƙare: {{copied}} an kwafa, {{skipped}} an tsallake.
cantRetryFiles: An kasa sake gwada kwafin fayil na Notion.

metricLabels.remappedRichTextMentions: sake taswirar hanyoyin haɗin rubutu mai wadata
metricLabels.unknownMarkdownBlocks: tubalan markdown da ba a sani ba
metricLabels.unresolvedLinkedTargets: hanyoyin haɗin da ba a warware ba
metricLabels.unresolvedLinkedViews: ra'ayoyin da ba a warware ba
metricLabels.unresolvedPropertyReferences: kaddarorin da ba a warware ba
metricLabels.unresolvedRichTextMentions: hanyoyin haɗin rubutu mai wadata da ba a warware ba
metricLabels.unresolvedRowRelationValues: ƙimar alaƙar layuka da ba a warware ba
metricLabels.unresolvedTemplateRelationValues: ƙimar alaƙar samfurori da ba a warware ba

wizard.needCredentialHint: Shigar da token na Notion ko zaɓi haɗin da aka ajiye don ci gaba.
wizard.needRootsHint: Zaɓi aƙalla abu ɗaya na tushe, liƙa hanyar haɗi/ID, ko yi amfani da workspace gabaɗaya.
wizard.readyHint_one: Abu {{count}} yana shirye don shigo da shi.
wizard.readyHint_other: Abubuwa {{count}} suna shirye don shigo da su.
wizard.runningHint: A buɗe wannan shafin burauza yayin da ake shigo.
wizard.noJobHint: Fara ganowa daga matakin Scope da farko.
wizard.applyLocksHint: Aiwatarwa yana rubuta abubuwan da aka gano cikin wannan workspace.
wizard.browserRunnerWarning: Wannan shigo yana gudana a wannan shafin burauza. A ci gaba da buɗe shafin har sai an gama. Rufe ko sake loda shafin yana dakatar da aiki; bude Hanji zai ci gaba daga inda aka ajiye.

installer.waitingForProgress: Ana jiran sabunta ci gaba na farko...

activity.searchComplete: An gama bincike — abubuwa {{n}} a cikin graph
activity.discoveryComplete: Bincike ya ƙare — an tattara abubuwa {{n}}
activity.remapRelations: Ana sake haɗa alaƙa da ambato

hanji.title: Shigo daga Hanji
hanji.fileHint: Fitar da shafi, database, ko workspace daga wani Hanji, sannan ka shigo da shi nan. Relations, rollups, formulas, views, da templates ana kiyaye su. Ba a haɗa da attachments ba.
hanji.liveHint: Cire workspace kai tsaye daga wani Hanji mai aiki (misali Docker dev instance). Dole ne remote ɗin ya ƙyale buƙatu daga wannan adireshin.
hanji.placeholderNote: An bar wasu attachments a matsayin masu riƙe wuri.
hanji.importedItems_one: An shigo da abu {{count}} daga fayil ɗin Hanji.
hanji.importedItems_other: An shigo da abubuwa {{count}} daga fayil ɗin Hanji.
hanji.cantRead: An kasa karanta fayil ɗin Hanji.
hanji.cantImport: An kasa shigo da fayil ɗin Hanji.
hanji.needRemote: Shigar da remote URL ɗin Hanji da workspace id.

oauthConfiguredHint: Wannan sabar tana da haɗin OAuth Notion da aka saita. Saitin token yana samuwa don haɗin kai masu ɗaukar nauyi.
